questionHtml: Outline one example of a human disease caused by an autosomal recessive allele.
markschemeHtml:
1.  name of condition e.g. PKU / other example;
  2.  mutation in the gene for (the enzyme) phenylalanine hydroxylase (PAH) / if other example used name of gene that is mutated;
  3.  outline of inheritance pattern, e.g. both parents need to carry the recessive allele;
  4.  (without dietary modification, result is) toxic build-up of phenylalanine in the blood / low levels of tyrosine / symptoms if other example used;
  5.  phenylalanine is not converted to tyrosine (by the enzyme) / effect of the mutation on the protein/enzyme/metabolism if other example used;
  6.  requires dietary modification (as treatment) / treatment for other example used;

meta.title: Outline one example of a human disease caused by an autosomal recessive allele.
breadcrumbLabels: D3.2.7. Phenylketonuria as an example of a human disease due to a recessive allele
